name: @pinagent/react-native
description: React Native widget for Pinagent — tap a view, leave a comment, an agent fixes it. Native client ships as source for Metro; the dev-server middleware is built for Node.
//peers: react (>=18), react-native (>=0.74), and react-native-view-shot (>=3) are required by src/native/ but intentionally NOT declared as peerDependencies: doing so drags the full React Native toolchain into this otherwise web-only monorepo's lockfile. The native client ships as source, so the consumer app provides these. See README + docs/architecture/react-native.md. Re-add them before publishing to npm.
